name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
§ Requested § Eldritch Being User § Tentacles § Oviposition §

It's breeding season for Eldritch Beings and Ghost is entirely too excited about it. He doesn't really care if they lay eggs inside him as long as he doesn't have to take care of them after they hatch.

This request was really only for either Ghost or König and I couldn't make up mind which. So I did both. You can find König here. Same scenario, totally different intros.

CW: Possible Non-Con and general monster weirdness. Despite testing I'm not 100% sure what'll happen.

Art by GRUHHHU.

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.
creator: RunningRiot
